case_title: C M BUSTO VS. UNITED NATIONS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSTO, C M

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-05-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF C M BUSTOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED NATIONS IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON JULY 15, 2021 IS INVALID FOR SERVICE IN CALIFORNIA. COURT CONTINUES TO MATTER TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO DETERMINE THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR UNITED NATIONS IN CALIFORNIA AND TO PROPERLY SERVE DEFENDANT UNITED NATIONS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY BUSTO, C M AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED NATIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FEE FOR CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSTO, C M
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$N/A) SERVED MAR-31-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED NATIONS
ORDER CSE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCTOBER 5, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF C.M. BUSTOS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT UNITED NATIONS. VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 THE COURT DENIES YOUR FEE WAIVER REQUEST BECAUSE [X] THE INFORMATION YOU PROVIDED ON THE REQUEST SHOWS THAT YOU ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR THE FEE WAIVER YOU REQUESTED, EVERYBOX REGARDING SERVICE OF INCOME IS MARKED. ADDITIONALLY , YOU STATE YOU HAVE AN INFINITE AMOUNT OF INCOME. AS TO PLAINTIFF BUSTO, C M
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JULY 21, 2021 AT 1:30PM IN DEPARTMENT 506, 400 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102.
